title: Rasukutty
subTitle: Rasukutty, an uneducated man, lies to his fiancee Rukmani that he is a lawyer. However, after Rukmani learns the truth, she breaks her engagement with him and starts hating him.

title: Ninaithaley Inikkum
subTitle: An energetic young woman Bommi captures the hearts of a sweet-making royal family. Her confident belief system plays a titular role in keeping the family together.

title: Enga Ooru Kavalkaran
subTitle: A young and beautiful woman falls in love with her bodyguard. However, they must overcome many challenges in order to be together.

title: Thendral Varum Theru
subTitle: A young man falls in love with a woman. However, he ends up going through emotional turmoil after she rejects his proposal and marries someone else.

title: Rajanadai
subTitle: Seetha, a married woman, conceals a secret about her fight against blood cancer from her husband. However, her mysterious death compels her husband to set out on a path for revenge.

title: Suvar Illatha Chithirangal
subTitle: Saroja, a spirited young woman from a poor family, falls deeply in love with Murthy, the heir to a wealthy family. However, when Murthy's father discovers their love, he abandons him.

title: Meendum Savithri
subTitle: Manju, a middle-class woman, meets Vasudevan, who seems to be the perfect future husband. She gets married to him but later discovers that he is already married to another woman, Uma.
